title: Principal Software Engineer – AI and C# with Azure
company_focus:
Integrated investment management solutions for asset
managers
description:
Principal Software Engineer – AI and C# with Azure

WHAT MAKES US, US

Join some of the most innovative thinkers in FinTech as we
lead the evolution of financial technology. If you are an
innovative, curious, collaborative person who embraces
challenges and wants to grow, learn and pursue outcomes with
our prestigious financial clients, say Hello to SimCorp!

At its foundation, SimCorp is guided by our values — caring,
customer success-driven, collaborative, curious, and
courageous. Our people-centered organization focuses on
skills development, relationship building, and client
success. We take pride in cultivating an environment where
all team members can grow, feel heard, valued, and
empowered.

If you like what we’re saying, keep reading!


WHY THIS ROLE IS IMPORTANT TO US

The Principal Software Engineer at SimCorp, is a senior
technical role responsible for designing, developing, and
delivering complex software solutions that meet both
business and client requirements. With typically 10+ years
of experience, this role involves leading engineering
projects, providing technical guidance, and ensuring the
scalability, performance, and quality of software systems.
The Principal Software Engineer collaborates closely with
product management, design, and other engineering teams to
define technical solutions and integrate them into the
product development lifecycle. This position requires strong
problem-solving skills, expertise in software engineering
practices, and the ability to mentor junior engineers

WHAT YOU WILL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR:

- Lead the design and development of high-impact software
  systems and AI driven solutions, ensuring they meet
  business and client needs.
- Provide technical leadership, guidance, and mentorship to
  other engineers, creating a culture of innovation and
  quality
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams, architects,
  security, including product management and quality
  assurance, to ensure seamless integration of solutions
  into the product.
- Review and improve software design, architecture, and
  implementation to ensure performance, security,
  scalability, and maintainability.
- Diagnose and resolve complex technical issues, ensuring the
  timely delivery of high-quality AI driven solutions in
  production
- Stay up to date with emerging technologies and best
  practices, continuously improving engineering processes
  and solutions.
- Contribute to the development, technical documentation,
  product backlog, and ensure alignment with product
  specifications and user requirements.
- Participate in code reviews, promoting and ensure adherence
  to coding standards and best practices in software
  development.
- Contributing to innovation in software engineering by
  bettering processes, tools, and methodology

WHAT WE VALUE

Most importantly, you can see yourself contributing and
thriving in the position described above.

- 10+ years of extensive hands-on experience in C# .Net
  development.

- Demonstrated expertise of 5+ years in designing and
  implementing AI solutions, including both generative and
  predictive AI.

- Comprehensive understanding and practical experience with
  application architecture, covering both frontend and
  backend systems

- Proven proficiency in working with Azure and Azure DevOps.

- Strong experience with Agile development methodologies, as
  well as DevOps and CI/CD practices

As a person, you have the following traits:

- Taking ownership. Comfortable taking the lead on tasks.

- Earn trust, think big, and take calculated risks.

- You collaborate with team members to work towards common
  goals.

- Solid problem-solving skills and comfortable questioning
  assumptions and as-is.

- Exhibits a consistent approach and a creative mindset.

- Thrives in a collaborative environment and values teamwork

- Like to have fun at work and positivity comes easily to you

- Excellent English verbal and communication skills

BENEFITS

Attractive salary, bonus scheme, and pension are essential
for any work agreement. However, in SimCorp we believe we
can offer more. Therefore, in addition to the traditional
benefit scheme, we provide a good work-life balance:
flexible working hours and a hybrid model. Simcorp follows a
global hybrid policy, asking employees to work from the
office two days each week while allowing remote work on
other days.

Simcorp does offer opportunities for professional
development: there is never just only one route - we offer
an individual approach to professional development to
support the direction you want to take.

NEXT STEPS

Please send us your application in English via our career
site as soon as possible, we process incoming applications
continually. Please note that only applications sent through
our system will be processed. At SimCorp, we recognize that
bias can unintentionally occur in the recruitment process.
To uphold fairness and equal opportunities for all
applicants, we kindly ask you to exclude personal data such
as photo, age, or any non-professional information from your
application. Thank you for aiding us in our endeavor to
mitigate biases in our recruitment process.

For any questions you are welcome to contact Swati
Pal(Swati.pal@simcorp.com), Talent Acquisition Partner. If
you are interested in being a part of SimCorp but are not
sure this role is suitable, submit your CV anyway. SimCorp
is on an exciting growth journey, and our Talent Acquisition
Team is ready to assist you discover the right role for you.
The approximate time to consider your CV is three weeks.

We are eager to continually improve our talent acquisition
process and make everyone’s experience positive and
valuable. Therefore, during the process we will ask you to
provide your feedback, which is highly appreciated.

WHO WE ARE?

For over 50 years, we have worked closely with investment
and asset managers to become the world’s leading provider of
integrated investment management solutions. We are 3,000+
colleagues with a broad range of nationalities, educations,
professional experiences, ages, and backgrounds.

SimCorp is an independent subsidiary of the Deutsche Börse
Group. Following the recent merger with Axioma, we leverage
the combined strength of our brands to provide an industry-
leading, full, front-to-back offering for our clients.

SimCorp is an equal opportunity employer and welcome
applicants from all backgrounds, without regard to race,
gender, age, disability, or any other protected status under
applicable law. We are committed to building a culture where
diverse perspectives and expertise are integrated into our
everyday work. We believe in the continual growth and
development of our employees, so that we can provide best-
in-class solutions to our clients.

#Li-Hybrid

Review and improve software design, architecture, and implementation to ensure performance, security, scalability, and maintainability

ai_classification_reasoning:
The role requires 5+ years of demonstrated expertise in
designing and implementing AI solutions, including both
generative and predictive AI. The responsibilities
specifically mention leading design and development of AI-
driven solutions and ensuring delivery of high-quality AI-
driven solutions in production, indicating hands-on work
building AI systems.
